## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy and kickoff details for Manifold's engagement with fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/1EPgeoRxRzk5sVi4MNHNxZw1_P2JsMki?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital can work with limited existing content, using authoritative sources and internal positioning docs to start](https://fathom.video/share/1EPgeoRxRzk5sVi4MNHNxZw1_P2JsMki?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [CMS integration is flexible; manual staging preferred for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/1EPgeoRxRzk5sVi4MNHNxZw1_P2JsMki?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
  - [Two workstreams: programmatic (templated) and editorial (custom) content creation](https://fathom.video/share/1EPgeoRxRzk5sVi4MNHNxZw1_P2JsMki?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Kickoff tentatively scheduled for 2/17, pending contract signing](https://fathom.video/share/1EPgeoRxRzk5sVi4MNHNxZw1_P2JsMki?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Approach

  - [Week 1: Extensive research and information gathering](https://fathom.video/share/1EPgeoRxRzk5sVi4MNHNxZw1_P2JsMki?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Week 2: Style calibration](https://fathom.video/share/1EPgeoRxRzk5sVi4MNHNxZw1_P2JsMki?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Weeks 3-4: "Bullseye" content piece published](https://fathom.video/share/1EPgeoRxRzk5sVi4MNHNxZw1_P2JsMki?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Leverage high-authority sources (e.g., Broad Institute) for backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/1EPgeoRxRzk5sVi4MNHNxZw1_P2JsMki?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [Custom knowledge bases and API integrations for targeted research](https://fathom.video/share/1EPgeoRxRzk5sVi4MNHNxZw1_P2JsMki?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### CMS Integration and Blog Optimization

  - [Manual content staging preferred for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/1EPgeoRxRzk5sVi4MNHNxZw1_P2JsMki?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Recommend blog template improvements:](https://fathom.video/share/1EPgeoRxRzk5sVi4MNHNxZw1_P2JsMki?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
      - [Table of contents](https://fathom.video/share/1EPgeoRxRzk5sVi4MNHNxZw1_P2JsMki?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)
      - [Left-rail navigation](https://fathom.video/share/1EPgeoRxRzk5sVi4MNHNxZw1_P2JsMki?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
      - [Footer optimization for accelerating page indexing](https://fathom.video/share/1EPgeoRxRzk5sVi4MNHNxZw1_P2JsMki?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [Webflow changes are straightforward; avoid overpaying for template updates](https://fathom.video/share/1EPgeoRxRzk5sVi4MNHNxZw1_P2JsMki?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### Workstream Differences

  - [Programmatic: Templated content for clusters/topics (e.g., glossaries, comparisons)](https://fathom.video/share/1EPgeoRxRzk5sVi4MNHNxZw1_P2JsMki?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Editorial: Custom outlines for diverse content pieces (5-10 per week)](https://fathom.video/share/1EPgeoRxRzk5sVi4MNHNxZw1_P2JsMki?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
  - [Both work together to identify successful content types and expand coverage](https://fathom.video/share/1EPgeoRxRzk5sVi4MNHNxZw1_P2JsMki?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)

### Kickoff Meeting

  - [Tentative date: 2/17 (first come, first served basis)](https://fathom.video/share/1EPgeoRxRzk5sVi4MNHNxZw1_P2JsMki?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
  - [3-4 key team members recommended for attendance](https://fathom.video/share/1EPgeoRxRzk5sVi4MNHNxZw1_P2JsMki?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)
  - [Technical experts better suited for follow-up deep dives](https://fathom.video/share/1EPgeoRxRzk5sVi4MNHNxZw1_P2JsMki?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)
  - [Kickoff covers goals, expectations, audience, strategy, and initial deep dives](https://fathom.video/share/1EPgeoRxRzk5sVi4MNHNxZw1_P2JsMki?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)

## Next Steps

  - Review and sign SOW
  - Prepare internal content and positioning materials
  - Await Notion space and kickoff template from fwd.digital
  - Finalize kickoff date and attendee list
  - Schedule any necessary follow-up deep dives with technical experts
